mapper.select: SELECT NOTIFICATION_ID, USER_ID, NOTIFICATION_TYPE, MESSAGE, FILE_ID, IS_READ, CREATED_AT FROM NOTIFICATION ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC
SELECT NOTIFICATION_ID, USER_ID, NOTIFICATION_TYPE, MESSAGE, FILE_ID, IS_READ, CREATED_AT FROM NOTIFICATION WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC
SELECT NOTIFICATION_ID, USER_ID, NOTIFICATION_TYPE, MESSAGE, FILE_ID, IS_READ, CREATED_AT FROM NOTIFICATION WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND IS_READ = 0 ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE NOTIFICATION SET IS_READ = 1 WHERE NOTIFICATION_ID = #{notificationId}
UPDATE NOTIFICATION SET IS_READ = 1 WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NOTIFICATION (USER_ID, NOTIFICATION_TYPE, MESSAGE, FILE_ID, CREATED_AT) VALUES (#{userId}, #{notificationType}, #{message}, #{fileId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
